holdings.infoBox: EMOP is an equity ETF with a total of 73 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 16.33%, SAMSUNG ELECTR GDR REG S GDR at 10.13%, SK HYNIX INC GDS GDR at 6.76%, Delta Electronics at 3.29%, and ICICI Bank at 3.11%.

overview.description: The AB Emerging Markets Opportunities ETF (EMOP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund actively invests in stocks from emerging markets or those economically tied to the area. The combines fundamental and quantitative research to select and weight securities EMOP was launched on Jun 17, 2025 and is issued by AB Funds.
